productName: SPR - 1g Hash Rosin Infused Joint - Lemonder Fuel x Angel's Wedding Cake
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Lemonder Fuel and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a bright, zesty lemon flavor, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
